## Summary

- What changed?
- Why was this change needed?

## Scope

- Runtime
- Docs
- Verification
- Community-health

## Truthfulness Check

- [ ] README remains accurate
- [ ] `docs/api-scope.md` remains accurate
- [ ] `docs/status-model.md` remains accurate
- [ ] launch or release evidence was updated if the change affects public claims

## Verification

- [ ] `npm test`
- [ ] `npm run build`
- [ ] Additional evidence attached if behavior changed

## Safety

- [ ] No PHI or real clinical data added
- [ ] No autonomous-diagnosis language introduced
- [ ] Security-sensitive changes follow `SECURITY.md`
